Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, eliminating outdated or incorrect marketing copy.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling, on-brand daily marketing email using scraped product data and predefined brand voice guidelines.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces unique, conversion-focused email copy every day without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of manual content creation.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the AI-generated email to HubSpot and sends it to the designated R1 Concepts contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers targeted marketing emails to segmented audiences daily with zero manual sending effort, maintaining consistent customer engagement.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, featured items, and promotional content to inform daily email creation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds every email in real, current product data specific to the DFC brand, ensuring relevance and accuracy for DFC's customer base.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a daily marketing email tailored to DFC's brand identity using the scraped website content as context.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily copywriting for a separate brand without additional headcount, keeping DFC customer communication consistent and professional.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the finalized DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures DFC contacts receive daily branded communications on schedule, driving repeat engagement and sales opportunities automatically.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket category, and associated contact details.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Instantly surfaces all pending support cases in a structured format, giving the AI full context needed to respond accurately without manual ticket review.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a tailored, professional reply for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with consistent quality and faster turnaround.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the ticket classification and draft reply back into the HubSpot ticket record for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support context inside HubSpot so agents work from one place, reducing tool switching and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all customer-reported issues from Amazon purchases into a single pull, replacing any manual export or copy-paste process.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, shareable view of return and issue trends, enabling faster identification of product quality problems or packaging issues.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, allowing the sales team to reach out while customer interest is at its peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an immediate alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email with the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between a customer showing interest and a sales rep being notified, enabling faster follow-up that increases conversion rates.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections and capabilities to be defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions at scale, reducing support load and improving response times for R1 Concepts shoppers.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and web sources daily to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospecting that would otherwise require hours of manual research, generating a fresh list of warm leads every day.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs each discovered lead as a new contact or company record in HubSpot with relevant details and source information.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Builds a tracked, organized pipeline of sublet prospects inside HubSpot, enabling follow-up sequencing and preventing duplicate outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Sends a personalized warm introduction email to each qualified lead highlighting the availability of 13140 Midway Place in Cerritos.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers timely, relevant outreach to businesses actively needing space without requiring any manual email drafting or sending by the team.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad data into one automated feed, eliminating manual report downloads and giving the AI full campaign context to work with.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget reallocation, and keyword insights.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Accelerates campaign optimization cycles and surfaces insights that improve ad efficiency across both brands, reducing wasted spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / DuckDuckGo API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using target keywords to surface relevant content creators across platforms.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator research with an automated multi-platform sweep, returning a broad set of candidates instantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Reviews each discovered creator's profile, content themes, and audience signals to assess relevance and fit for the campaign.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters raw discovery results into a curated shortlist of genuinely relevant creators, saving teams from manually vetting hundreds of profiles.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist based on what matters most to the campaign, removing guesswork and bias from influencer selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-approved outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign uses brand-approved messaging and up-to-date creator targeting criteria without manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand inbox.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates bulk creator outreach delivery while maintaining a personal sender identity, accelerating top-of-funnel influencer pipeline.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes to train and inform the AI response context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real past conversations, improving negotiation accuracy and tone consistency across creator relationships.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and surfaces their content for AI analysis and response drafting.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and ensures no creator reply goes unaddressed, keeping deal momentum active.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply against historical negotiation patterns and generates a contextually appropriate response to advance the deal.
Creator Reponse.impact: Shortens negotiation cycles by delivering informed, brand-consistent replies instantly rather than waiting on manual review.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers to generate the formatted load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle part data, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds instead of hours.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a new HubSpot email draft with the generated load sheet and sales sheet attached for the MHM campaign.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates weekly email production end-to-end, ensuring sales reps receive ready-to-send campaign assets every Monday without delays.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Sends an automated notification to the relevant team channel confirming the MHM email draft is ready for review and send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the team informed in real time so the campaign can be approved and deployed on schedule without manual status chasing.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails based on product data inputs.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Cuts email copywriting time from hours to minutes, enabling DFC to launch First to Market campaigns immediately when new products are available.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates fully formatted email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, sales sheets, and proper campaign tagging applied.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers publish-ready email assets directly into HubSpot so marketers can review and send without any manual reformatting or uploading.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Replaces manual HubSpot report exports and copy-paste work, ensuring slide data is always current and error-free.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data for the monthly reporting window.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically populates web performance slides with accurate GA4 data, eliminating manual dashboard screenshot workflows.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue generated.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Ensures SMS performance data is consistently included in the deck without requiring manual Attentive report pulls each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, updating charts, tables, and text placeholders automatically.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Completes 8 slides of the monthly deck in minutes, freeing the marketing team from hours of manual data entry and formatting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes R1 Concepts' current keyword rankings and identifies content gaps where competitors outrank the site.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints exactly which keyword opportunities to target, ensuring every blog produced drives measurable organic traffic growth.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written, SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps with structured headings and meta content.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog content at scale, dramatically reducing the cost and time of SEO content production.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and description.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Delivers fully optimized, live blog content without any manual CMS work, accelerating the cadence of SEO publishing.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, due dates, and outstanding quantities for processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual PO report generation and data extraction, giving the workflow a consistent and structured data starting point.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Turns raw ERP exports into actionable CRM workflows, ensuring every overdue PO triggers a timely vendor follow-up without manual intervention.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide logic within the browser tool.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched and formatted results as a DFC load sheet Excel file ready for use in sales and fulfillment workflows.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the previous MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new weekly send.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, and product-level revenue for analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete and structured sales data foundation that powers all downstream segmentation and campaign targeting decisions.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on analyzed sales patterns and enrolls them into targeted email sequences.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends segmented SMS campaigns to high-priority reorder and win-back customer lists with personalized product and timing messaging.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches customers on a high-engagement channel with timely, relevant offers, increasing conversion rates beyond email alone.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, removing lag between file upload and email deployment.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps the download link with the new file URL, and schedules delivery for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a fully personalized, on-brand weekly email with zero manual design or scheduling work, maintaining consistent Saturday morning cadence for all subscribers.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written, SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleets based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog articles at scale without copywriter hours, accelerating DFC's organic search presence in competitive B2B segments.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes or stages it as a formatted post with proper SEO fields, tags, and categories applied.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches vehicle background data from Wikipedia to seed the content pipeline.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting per video, giving the workflow rich, vehicle-specific source material before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and reference material to generate a fully structured Friction Friday video script, including intro hook, key brake/friction talking points, and a call to action.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice profile.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed script, voiceover file reference, thumbnail asset, and assembled video metadata via Apps Script webhook, logging the full package in a structured row for review and archiving.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Centralizes every deliverable in one trackable location so the team can review, approve, or publish without digging through multiple tools or file systems.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows, enrollment triggers, and sequence logic to audit for gaps, redundancies, and misfires.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and account metadata for matching against HubSpot contacts.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a reliable data foundation that links ERP purchase history and account data directly to CRM contacts, enabling sales automation based on real customer behavior.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks ERP-triggered sales workflows in HubSpot so DFC's team can automate outreach based on order history, account tier, and purchasing patterns.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in scoping and planning — no active connections or workflow steps have been defined yet.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and indexed page data for all DFC blog content.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives DFC a clear view of which blog topics are gaining search traction, enabling faster decisions on content doubling or topic pivots.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session data, organic traffic volume, time-on-page, and conversion events attributed to DFC blog posts for the reporting period.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects blog traffic directly to business outcomes, showing whether SEO content is generating qualified visits and downstream engagement.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Exports post-level metadata including publish dates, word counts, categories, and Yoast SEO scores for all blog content published in the period.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking movement, total impressions, and click data across all R1 Concepts blog URLs.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Tracks the compounding SEO value of the blog agent over time, showing month-over-month ranking improvements that justify continued content investment.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic, engagement metrics, and goal completions tied to R1 blog content for the reporting dashboard.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Exports a monthly log of published posts including titles, categories, word counts, and publish timestamps for output tracking.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a clear content production record that ties volume and consistency to traffic outcomes, validating the agent's monthly throughput.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors Richard's Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice emails and extracts attached PDF files for processing.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual PDF downloading and sorting, ensuring every incoming invoice is captured and queued for stamping without human intervention.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the completed stamped-and-signed PDF back via Outlook to the appropriate recipient or saves it to a designated output folder for record-keeping.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks and identifies which DFC prospect pages are being visited and feeds that behavioral data into the workflow trigger system.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support requests across channels and queues them for AI classification and response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all support volume into a single intake point, reducing missed tickets and ensuring every customer request enters the resolution pipeline.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, urgency, and resolution category, then drafts or routes an appropriate response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Slashes average ticket handle time by automating triage and first-response drafting, freeing support agents for complex escalations only.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, sends the drafted response to the customer, and logs resolution status.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Closes the loop on routine tickets without agent intervention, improving response time SLAs and customer satisfaction scores.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young shares the monthly new arrivals file via Teams, initiating the NAG distribution workflow.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Creates a reliable, documented handoff point that triggers the entire downstream automation without manual follow-up or status checks.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the uploaded parts file and updates the DFC product database with the new arrival inventory and metadata.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an automated outreach sequence and sends templated RFQ emails requesting cost and lead time proposals.

Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Removes hours of manual bid comparison by instantly surfacing only viable carrier candidates, accelerating procurement decisions with objective data.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance data across all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates multi-platform data collection into a single automated pull, eliminating the need to manually export reports from three separate ad platforms each week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares this week's metrics against the rolling average of the prior month's performance and identifies channels or campaigns that are over- or under-performing.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Delivers instant, interpreted performance context rather than raw numbers, helping the media team spot meaningful shifts and act on them faster.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends a formatted weekly checkup summary email to the relevant team members with channel-by-channel performance comparisons and key callouts.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Keeps the entire team aligned on paid media health every week with zero manual reporting work, enabling faster budget and creative decisions.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Aggregates the full month's paid channel performance data across Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads for end-of-month reporting.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures and formats the aggregated data into slide-ready monthly report content, including performance narratives, highlights, and key takeaways.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Transforms raw data into presentation-ready insights in minutes, saving hours of manual formatting and ensuring the narrative is clear and consistent every month.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders via email, formatted and ready for insertion into end-of-month slides.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Eliminates last-minute report scrambling by delivering a polished, stakeholder-ready report automatically, improving meeting preparation and professionalism.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty form and tags them with a qualifying audience segment property.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana projects and tasks for status changes, new assignments, blockers, or overdue items that require attention.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the summarized Asana project status report to relevant team members or managers via email.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting where tasks, owners, and deadlines are discussed.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Routes the raw meeting notes or transcript to the processing pipeline as a structured input for AI extraction.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's catalog and live inventory database using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all stocked parts and identify gaps where no matching part exists.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Surfaces the full in-stock and missing-parts picture instantly, replacing what would otherwise require a manual catalog lookup across multiple SKU lists.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the raw inventory query results into a clean, formatted Excel-ready output, organizing stocked versus missing parts clearly and flagging key gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Transforms a database dump into a polished, decision-ready document without any manual formatting work from Mark or the operations team.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with a summary of what DFC stocks and what is missing for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, actionable catalog to Mark's inbox in minutes instead of days, enabling faster quoting and sourcing decisions for special markets customers.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries live inventory records for every part on the backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen separate manual lookups with a single automated pull, giving the team a real-time enriched view of every backordered part in one pass.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the weekly backorder report, appending status columns for each part and flagging any line items with no available source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces a single enriched report that gives every stakeholder immediate visibility into part status without redundant individual lookups or version confusion.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder lines, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated resolution details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual email drafting for backorder communications across the team, ensuring customers receive consistent, timely updates without staff spending hours composing individual messages.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotor listings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor catalog coverage in minutes rather than the days it would take to manually browse and record three separate vendor catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage gaps and overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC is missing coverage that competitors offer, giving the product team a clear prioritization list for sourcing and catalog expansion.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from actual buyers at scale without requiring manual outreach, helping prioritize which gaps are worth filling first.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, authoritative document covering the full two-piece rotor landscape — competitive coverage, DFC gaps, and demand data — ready for sourcing decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy fields — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every live campaign for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete universe of live ad copy in one pull, ensuring no active ad is missed during compliance or quality investigations.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified target phrases, flags each match, and records the exact field name, ad ID, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Identifies every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across hundreds of ads instantly, replacing what would be an exhaustive manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy excerpt where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, ready-to-act findings brief directly to the requestor, enabling fast remediation without anyone having to dig through the ad platforms manually.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Feeds live campaign data — including ad copy, spend, performance metrics, and audience targeting — from both Meta and TikTok into the conversational interface.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot a real-time, cross-platform data foundation so users can ask questions about paid performance without manually pulling platform reports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets user questions about paid channel performance and generates clear, data-grounded answers and recommendations using the live Meta and TikTok feed.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables anyone on the team to get instant, accurate answers about paid campaign performance without needing platform access or analyst support.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and triggers the review workflow for each new submission.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every inbound application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates being missed in a busy shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive organized by role and applicant name for reliable archiving and future reference.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable resume library without anyone manually saving files, ensuring no application is lost and audit trails are maintained.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, produces a fit assessment, and determines the appropriate next action — approve for review, deny, or flag as pending due to a paused role.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces resume screening time dramatically by giving hiring managers a prioritized, scored shortlist instead of an undifferentiated inbox of PDFs.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant decision to a dashboard with columns for score, role, outcome, and reply status, and routes paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, filterable record of every application decision, making pipeline reviews and re-engagement of pending candidates effortless.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 56 agents total, with 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, the foundation we've built continues to run and deliver value across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, customer support, and more. Stay tuned for more updates as our in-progress agents push toward completion!
